reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Te proporcionan el password del wifi si no tenes cobertura para pagar con la app de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They provide the Wi-Fi password if you don't have cell service to pay with the YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSa2RDZTJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuiden al señor que está en la caja adentro de la estación vendiendo golosinas y sirviendo en las mesas del turno noche. Un ejemplo de ganas de trabajar y excelente voluntad. Re buena onda.

(Translated by Google)
Take care of the gentleman at the cash register inside the station, selling candy and waiting on the tables during the night shift. He's a model of hard work and excellent will. He's really cool.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNScU5LU1B3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y cordialidad, inclusive la nafta más barata, con relación a la Shell que esta a 1 cuadra, hay 17 pesos de diferencia en la YPF ACA sale $ 183.30 y en la Shell $ 200,20

(Translated by Google)
Good service and friendliness, even cheaper gas, compared to Shell which is 1 block away, there is a 17 peso difference in YPF ACA it costs $183.30 and in Shell it costs $200.20
